prompt: A single uninterrupted 30-second cinematic sequence with a clear beginning, escalation, near-miss, recovery, and final payoff. The action must keep evolving across the full duration with no cuts, no loop, no freeze, no reset, and no repeated motion cycle. Every few seconds a new visual beat appears while the same scene and subject remain temporally coherent. Extremely high motion energy: a wingsuit rescue pilot dives through a storm-lit alpine canyon at sunrise, threads between rock spires, skims a waterfall, punches through snow mist, dives under a broken rope bridge, matches speed beside a falling rescue pod, makes violent banking corrections, then pulls up over a glacier at the end. Aggressive chase-drone camera, rapid parallax, close fly-bys, whip pans, tilt drops, realistic lighting, cinematic motion blur, strong temporal consistency.
